notes: Pac-Man moves every frame without speed-based timing so it zips uncontrollably fast, nextDir is stored but never applied to change direction, ghosts use tile-stepping without interpolation making movement jerky, attract screen shows nothing, and the maze rendering lacks proper wall outlines making it look like a blue grid rather than a recognizable Pac-Man maze.
The game is completely unplayable because the player's input is saved to `nextDir` but never applied to `dir`, and movement logic ignores delta time, causing entities to move at 60 tiles per second.

This resembles Pac-Man visually at a basic level, but the core game is badly broken because input never affects movement, movement ignores dt and grid-turning, lives/reset logic is wrong, and level progression/state handling is incomplete.
